headline: Oil Prices Fall Even More on Report That Trump Called Iran War ‘Very Complete’
summary: Oil prices made a decisive U-turn on Monday after President Donald Trump told a reporter that the Iran War could be over soon, swinging more than $25 in a matter of hours.

headline: 'Tencent Is Said To Be Back On Paramount-Warner Bros Deal With Fresh Funding' - Bloomberg

raw.headline: 'Tencent Is Said To Be Back On Paramount-Warner Bros Deal With Fresh Funding' - Bloomberg

headline: Tencent Is Said to Be Back On Paramount-Warner Bros Deal With Fresh Funding
summary: Paramount’s offer for Warner Bros. in December included a $1 billion equity commitment from Tencent, according to a filing at the time, but that was withdrawn after Warner Bros. raised concerns that the Chinese company’s presence could lead to national security challenges with US regulators.  After Paramount raised and amended its offer, Warner Bros. agreed to sell to the David Ellison-led company in a deal worth $110 billion.

raw.headline: Tencent Is Said to Be Back On Paramount-Warner Bros Deal With Fresh Funding
